pageContext.name: Zombie Mania
pageContext.description: Roll Dice to fight off a horde of Zombies and send them back to the graveyard where they belong… and maybe direct a few in your opponent's direction while you are at it! Zombie Mania is a push your luck dice game where players try to remove the zombies who have invaded their buildings with successful dice rolls. You may re-roll your dice if you saved a gravestone that tosses, but will you improve your results, or fail to remove any zombies at all by continuing to roll?  First player to remove all Zombies from their building wins!
